top3.sql:
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON ws_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    cd_dep_count = 6
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    d_year,
    d_moy
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    d_year...

SELECT 
    cd_demo_sk,
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON ws_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    cd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY 
    cd_demo_sk,
    d_year,
    d_moy
ORDER BY 
    cd_demo_sk,
    d_year,
    d_moy
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    d_year,
    d_moy,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON ws_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    hd_dep_count = 6
    AND d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    ...

ORDER BY

    d_moy
LIMIT 100
